expectations.text: Report contains all 5 required metric lines from spec 10.3
DB advisor line shows FalkorDB and Postgres breakdown
Report uses spec 10.3 em-dash separator format
Recommendation correctly identifies improving cache (delta=+11.4pp) and does NOT fire the stagnant-cache false alarm
expectations.evidence: 'Cache hit rate below target — more consistent prompt framing will improve this'. Old skill fires this even though cache improved +11.4pp — this is a false alarm that erodes user trust.
